subject: fix(pwa): harden manifest for Chrome Android install + add diagnostics
body:
Chrome 145 on Android wasn't firing beforeinstallprompt despite the SW
registering and icons existing. Three defensive manifest fixes:
- Add explicit `id` field so Chrome has stable app identity
- Add `purpose: 'any'` explicitly on non-maskable icons
- Add `prefer_related_applications: false` to prevent store-redirect

Also adds install system diagnostic logging: init state (browser,
standalone, dismissed) at boot, and a 5s warning if beforeinstallprompt
hasn't arrived yet (with manifest-link and SW-controller checks).

Tags: pwa, install, debug, manifest
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: patch
